# wx.jamestannahill.com — Full Content Index

## Station Identity
wx.jamestannahill.com is a live personal weather station dashboard for Midtown Manhattan, New York City.
Station ID: KNYNEWYO2140 (Ambient Weather network)
Location: 40.75°N 73.98°W (Midtown Manhattan)
Hardware: Ambient Weather WS-2902 series
Data resolution: 5-minute intervals
Coverage: 2024–present

## Data Fields
All fields available via API:
- tempf: Temperature (°F)
- humidity: Relative humidity (%)
- windspeedmph: Wind speed (mph)
- windgustmph: Wind gust (mph)
- winddir: Wind direction (degrees)
- baromrelin: Barometric pressure (inHg, relative)
- uvi: UV index (0–11+)
- solarradiation: Solar radiation (W/m²)
- hourlyrainin: Hourly rainfall (inches)
- dailyrainin: Daily rainfall (inches)
- dewPoint: Dew point (°F)
- feelsLike: Feels-like temperature (°F)
- comfort_score: Microclimate Comfort Score (0–100, computed)
- rain_prob: Rain probability next 60 min (%, computed)
- uhi_delta: Urban Heat Island delta vs JFK/LGA/EWR airports (°F, computed)

## API Endpoints
- GET https://api.wx.jamestannahill.com/current — Latest observation (all fields + computed)
- GET https://api.wx.jamestannahill.com/history?hours=24 — History for past N hours
- GET https://api.wx.jamestannahill.com/records — 30-day station records
- GET https://api.wx.jamestannahill.com/analog — Analog forecast (next 3 hours)
- GET https://api.wx.jamestannahill.com/rain-events — Recent rain events
- GET https://api.wx.jamestannahill.com/nearby — Nearby Ambient Weather stations

## Computed Metrics
### Comfort Score (0–100)
Composite of: feels-like deviation from 71°F ideal, humidity, wind speed, UV index, rain rate. Season-weighted and compared to this station's own 90-day baseline.

### Rain Probability
Logistic regression on: humidity, 1-hour pressure trend, dew-point depression, hour-of-day. Calibrated for NYC (~120 rain days/year). Auto-boosted if rain currently falling.

### Urban Heat Island Delta
This Midtown station minus average of JFK, LGA, EWR ASOS readings via NOAA aviationweather.gov API. Positive = Midtown warmer than surrounding airports.

### Analog Forecast
Nearest-neighbor pattern matching on 90 days of 5-minute data. Finds 5 most similar 6-hour weather patterns and averages their subsequent 3-hour trajectories. Recomputed every 30 minutes.

## Pages
- / — Live dashboard (conditions grid, comfort calendar, analog forecast, station records, history charts, rain events, nearby stations)
- /docs.html — Technical documentation (how it works, data sources, methodology, API reference)

## Data Sources
- Primary: Ambient Weather Network (station KNYNEWYO2140) via CatHouz aggregator
- Airport ASOS: NOAA aviationweather.gov (JFK, LGA, EWR) for UHI delta
- Daily forecast: Apple WeatherKit (tomorrow's conditions)
